backend/main.mo: Actor managing user profiles with authorization checks and a detailed order system including creation, storage, and type definitions.
backend/migration.mo: Stub migration module exposing a no‑op run function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to related frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated summaries of various frontend components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark OKLCH color tokens and base styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring favicon assets and loading the React app root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app toggling between admin order management and the customer-facing site based on URL hash.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin interface for viewing, searching, and inspecting orders with detailed dialogs and status indicators.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Access denied screen prompting non-admin users to log in with admin credentials.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with status handling and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section listing email, phone, WhatsApp, and business hours using card-based UI.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with brand info, quick links, contact details, social icons, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with scroll detection, mobile menu, and navigation links including admin visibility based on authentication.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image, marketing content, feature highlights, and smooth scroll to products.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Order form handling validation, order creation, and payment flow using Razorpay and backend hooks.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Product listing section showing Multani Mitti items with pricing, images, and scroll-to-order action.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, stored identity loading, and state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useMarkOrderAsPaid.ts: Mutation hook that marks an order as paid and invalidates related order queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of hooks for user profiles, admin checks, order creation, retrieval, and search using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRazorpayKeyId.ts: Fetches and caches the Razorpay key ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light and dark theme variables and base styles.
frontend/src/lib/razorpay.ts: Loads the Razorpay checkout script and opens the payment modal with provided callbacks and options.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it in React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/types/razorpay.d.ts: TypeScript definitions for Razorpay checkout options, responses, and global constructor.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project state, including existing features, new feature requests, architectural notes, and metadata for the order and payment flow changes.
